%%
%% The first command in your LaTeX source must be the \documentclass
%% command.
%%
%% For submission and review of your manuscript please change the

\documentclass[screen, manuscript]{acmart}
\acmJournal{TOSEM}

\usepackage[capitalise]{cleveref} % 引用增强，必须放在hyperref之后
\usepackage{stfloats}             % 双栏排版优化
\usepackage{verbatim}             % 原样输出
\usepackage{pifont}               % 特殊符号
\usepackage{subcaption}           % 子图支持 (替代 subfigure)
\usepackage{enumitem}             % 列表定制
\usepackage{makecell}             % 表格换行
\usepackage{todonotes}            % 待办事项
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{tcolorbox}            % 彩色文本框
\usepackage{listings}             % 代码块
\usepackage{multirow}             % 表格多行合并
\usepackage{soul}                 % 强调/高亮
\usepackage{ragged2e}             % 文本对齐
\usepackage{threeparttable}       % 带注释的表格
\usepackage{colortbl}             % 表格颜色
\usepackage{tabularx}             % 自动宽表格
\usepackage{adjustbox}            % 调整盒子大小
\usepackage{array}                % 数组与表格扩展
\usepackage{mdframed}             % 跨页边框
\usepackage{wrapfig}              % 文字绕排
\usepackage{textcomp}             % 特殊文本符号

\definecolor{lb}{HTML}{D9F2D1}

\tcbuselibrary{listings}
\tcbuselibrary{breakable}
\tcbuselibrary{skins}

\newtcolorbox{boxK}{
    top=2.4pt,
    bottom=2.4pt,
    left=4.5pt,
    right=4.5pt,
    boxrule = 0pt,
    toprule = 0pt,
    enhanced,
    fuzzy shadow = {0pt}{-1pt}{-0.2pt}{0.2pt}{black!35}
}

\begin{document}

%%
%% The "title" command has an optional parameter,
%% allowing the author to define a "short title" to be used in page headers.
\title{FeatBench: Towards More Realistic Evaluation of Feature-level Code Generation}

%%
%% The "author" command and its associated commands are used to define
%% the authors and their affiliations.
%% Of note is the shared affiliation of the first two authors, and the
%% "authornote" and "authornotemark" commands
%% used to denote shared contribution to the research.
\author{Haorui Chen}
\orcid{0009-0006-7191-9550}
\email{hrchen@std.uestc.edu.cn}
\affiliation{
  \institution{College of AI, Tsinghua University}
  \city{Beijing}
  \country{China}
}
\affiliation{
  \institution{University of Electronic Science and Technology of China}
  \city{Chengdu}
  \country{China}
}

\author{Chengze Li}
\orcid{0009-0008-0431-0125}
\email{231220004@smail.nju.edu.cn}
\affiliation{
  \institution{College of AI, Tsinghua University}
  \city{Beijing}
  \country{China}
}
\affiliation{
  \institution{Nanjing University}
  \city{Nanjing}
  \country{China}
}

\author{Jia Li}
\orcid{0000-0002-5579-8852}
\authornote{The corresponding author.}
\email{jia_li@mail.tsinghua.edu.cn}
\affiliation{
  \institution{College of AI, Tsinghua University}
  \city{Beijing}
  \country{China}
}

%%
%% By default, the full list of authors will be used in the page
%% headers. Often, this list is too long, and will overlap
%% other information printed in the page headers. This command allows
%% the author to define a more concise list
%% of authors' names for this purpose.
\renewcommand{\shortauthors}{Chen et al.}
%%
%% The abstract is a short summary of the work to be presented in the
%% article.
\input{document/abstract}

\ccsdesc[500]{Software and its engineering~General programming languages}
\ccsdesc[500]{Computing methodologies~Natural language processing}
\ccsdesc[300]{Software and its engineering~Software development techniques}

%%
%% Keywords. The author(s) should pick words that accurately describe
%% the work being presented. Separate the keywords with commas.
\keywords{LLM, Coding Agents, Benchmark, Feature Implementation}

% \received{20 February 2007}

% \received[accepted]{5 June 2009}

%%
%% This command processes the author and affiliation and title
%% information and builds the first part of the formatted document.
\maketitle

\input{document/intro}
\input{document/related}
\input{document/body}
\input{document/experiments}
\input{document/discussion}
\input{document/conclusion}

\appendix
